channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Justin Bieber's Coachella set challenges traditional ideas of live performance through YouTube nostalgia
item.description: Justin Bieber returned to the stage after a four-year touring break to headline Coachella's main stage in front of up to 125,000 attendees, with millions more watching the YouTube livestream. While mu...

item.title: Rethinking Climate Solutions: The Risks of Technological Fixes and the Case for Humility
item.description: Richard King's book, 'Brave New Wild: Can Technology Really Save the Planet?', critiques the growing reliance on technological solutions—often called 'technofixes'—to address climate change. King warn...

item.title: COA lifts disallowance on Pasig officials in P45M appliance procurement
item.description: The Commission on Audit (COA) has cleared Pasig Vice Mayor Robert Vincent Jude 'Dodot' Jaworski Jr. and two other city officials in connection with a P45-million appliance procurement undertaken in 20...

item.title: 90-Year-Old Woman in South Korea Receives Sentence for Money Laundering
item.description: In a rare legal case that has captured international attention, South Korean authorities have sentenced a 90-year-old woman for her involvement in money laundering activities. The elderly woman was fo...

item.title: South African Couple Faces Shoplifting Charges in US, Remains in Immigration Detention
item.description: A South African couple, Melany and Peet Viljoen, are currently facing shoplifting charges in the United States and remain in immigration enforcement detention. They were arrested in Florida on March 1...

item.title: Current Situation in the Middle East Amid US-Iran Tensions
item.description: As of April 15, 2026, tensions in the Middle East remain high, particularly involving the United States and Iran. A two-week ceasefire had been declared earlier in the US-Israeli conflict involving Ir...

item.title: England's Kane Back, Ticket Protests Grow, and Football's Ongoing Conversations
item.description: Harry Kane's return to the England national team marks a fresh start, coinciding with growing discontent over ticket prices and broader discussions within the football community. The article details K...

item.title: CDA anti-encroachment operation in Noorpur Shahan faces violent resistance from villagers
item.description: In Islamabad's Noorpur Shahan area, the Capital Development Authority (CDA) launched an anti-encroachment operation on Tuesday targeting illegal houses in Noori Bagh Mohallah. The operation escalated ...

item.title: KP Government Proposes Legal Recognition for Kalash Marriages
item.description: The Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (KP) government has introduced a landmark bill in the provincial assembly to formally register marriages within the Kalash minority community, setting the legal minimum age for ...

item.title: Dealing with Mental Pressure: Recognizing and Releasing What Weighs You Down
item.description: This piece talk about the kinda tiredness wey no show for your fitness tracker or normal checkup – the mental fatigue. Many people just accept am as part of adulthood, but e no need be so! This mental...

item.title: House Democrats propose commission to evaluate President Trump’s ability to serve
item.description: House Democrats have tabled legislation aiming to form a commission to evaluate whether President Donald Trump is fit to continue in office under the 25th Amendment. The proposed bill, backed by 50 De...

item.title: Zamfara State launches 120-day plan to improve schools and education system
item.description: Governor Dauda Lawal of Zamfara State don ok a 120-day Rapid Intervention Action Plan wey go tackle major wahala wey dey affect education sector for the state. This one na part of the 65th Council mee...

item.title: Zoji La tunnel excavation nears breakthrough, with final blast expected around May 30
item.description: The Zoji La tunnel, a strategically important project that will give all-weather connectivity between Kashmir and Ladakh, is close to reaching a major construction milestone. According to the project ...

item.title: Justice Department Opinion Challenges Presidential Records Act, Raising Concerns About Transparency
item.description: Before 1978, U.S. presidents owned and could freely dispose of their official records. The Presidential Records Act (PRA), enacted in 1978 following the Watergate scandal, transferred ownership of pre...

item.title: Voters in West Bengal face uncertainty over tribunal hearing process for SIR deletions
item.description: In West Bengal, voters whose names have been removed from the electoral roll under the SIR (Systematic Information Review) deletion face uncertainty as there is no clear procedure for hearings before ...

item.title: Alberta Maintains Gas Tax Rates Despite Federal Temporary Reduction
item.description: Amid rising fuel prices, the federal government has announced a temporary pause on the gas tax to provide relief to Canadians. Despite this federal measure, the Alberta government has decided to maint...

item.title: Trump Supporters Criticize Deleted AI Image Comparing Him to Jesus
item.description: Supporters of President Donald Trump expressed strong disapproval after he shared an AI-generated image on Truth Social that appeared to depict him as Jesus Christ. The post, which was later deleted, ...

item.title: IFS Report: Help to Buy Scheme Primarily Benefited Higher-Income Households
item.description: A new report from the Institute for Fiscal Studies (IFS) has found that the Help to Buy scheme, introduced in England in 2013, largely benefited higher-income individuals, particularly in areas with m...

item.title: Deputy Minister Emphasises Necessity of Broad-Based Black Economic Empowerment in South Africa
item.description: Deputy Minister of Planning, Monitoring and Evaluation Joel Mohai emphasised at a recent B-BEEE Symposium that broad-based black economic empowerment (B-BBEE) is essential for addressing historic ineq...

item.title: Prince Harry visits Canberra to honour veterans and attend Invictus Australia events
item.description: Prince Harry is set to make a solo visit to Canberra on Wednesday afternoon, focusing on paying tribute to veterans and supporting causes he champions. During his visit to the Australian War Memorial,...
